home.title: Extract Keywords from Text or URL
home.subtitle: Free online keyword extraction tool — Instant results, no signup required
home.placeholderText: Paste or type your text here...
home.noResults: Enter text or URL and click extract to see results
home.seoHowTitle: How the Website Keyword Extractor Works
home.seoHowDesc1: Our keyword extraction tool analyzes your text to identify the most important terms and phrases. Using word frequency analysis, stop-word filtering, and multi-word phrase detection, it surfaces the keywords that best represent your content.
home.seoHowDesc2: Simply paste your text or enter a URL, click "Extract Keywords," and receive a ranked list of keywords with their frequency count and density percentage.
home.seoHowStep1Title: Paste Your Text or Enter a URL
home.seoHowStep1Desc: Open the Text tab to paste your content directly, or switch to the URL tab to enter any publicly accessible webpage address. The URL extractor automatically fetches the page content so you don't have to copy and paste manually.
home.seoHowStep2Desc: Our tool performs word frequency analysis, filters out common stop words, and identifies multi-word phrases including bigrams and trigrams so you get a complete picture of your content's keyword profile.
home.seoHowStep3Desc: Browse results sorted by frequency and density. Use filter tabs to view one-word, two-word, or three-word phrases. Download as CSV or copy to clipboard for use in your SEO tools and spreadsheets.
home.seoWhyDesc: Keyword extraction is essential for SEO optimization, content analysis, and research. Understanding which terms dominate your content helps you align with search intent, improve readability, and target the right audience. Marketers, writers, and researchers use keyword extraction to validate content strategy and discover untapped opportunities.
home.seoWhy1: SEO Optimization — Identify focus keywords for your content
home.seoWhy2: Competitor Analysis — Understand what keywords competitors target
home.seoWhy3: Content Strategy — Plan your content around high-value keywords
home.seoWhy4: Market Research — Discover trending topics in your niche
home.seoFaq1A: Yes, the Text and URL extraction modes are completely free. No signup or account required. AI-powered semantic extraction is planned as a Pro feature for users who need deeper contextual analysis.
home.seoFaq2Q: How accurate is the keyword extraction?
home.seoFaq2A: The tool uses word frequency, stop-word filtering, keyword density, and multi-word phrase detection (bigrams and trigrams) to identify meaningful keywords. This approach works well for most English text where keyword frequency and phrase patterns are useful. AI-powered semantic extraction, which uses contextual understanding for more nuanced results, is planned as a future Pro feature.
home.seoFaq3Q: Can I extract keywords from any website?
home.seoFaq3A: The URL mode can extract content from most publicly accessible web pages. Some sites with paywalls, login requirements, or anti-scraping measures may not be accessible. For best results, copy the text directly and use the Text tab.
home.seoFaq4Q: What formats can I download the results in?
home.seoFaq4A: Results can be downloaded as a CSV file (compatible with Excel and Google Sheets) or copied to your clipboard as tab-separated values for quick pasting into any application.
home.seoCtaDesc: Ready to extract keywords from your content?
home.seoHowToUseTitle: How to Extract Keywords from Text or URL in 3 Simple Steps
home.seoUseSeoDesc: Analyze competitor content and identify target keywords on any webpage using our SEO keyword extractor. Verify your own content strategy by running pages through the URL extractor to see which terms appear most often, and uncover content gaps your competitors overlook.
home.seoUseContentDesc: Paste your draft article to extract keywords from text and verify your target terms appear naturally. Find keywords in text you've already written to identify missing topics, and optimize posts for search engines before publishing.
home.seoUseAcademicDesc: Apply keyword extraction for NLP research tasks and document analysis. Extract keywords from documents, research papers, or literature to quickly identify main themes, track topic shifts across collections, and build keyword indices for systematic reviews.
home.seoUseMarketingDesc: Audit landing pages and competitor websites by extracting keywords from web pages without manual review. Use the website keyword extractor to analyze any URL and understand the keyword profile of both your own pages and competitive targets.
home.seoHowStatsDesc: The extractor counts how many times each word appears in your text and calculates density as a percentage of total word count. Higher-frequency words rank higher, giving you a clear picture of the dominant terms and themes in any body of text.
home.seoHowFilterDesc: Common English words like 'the,' 'is,' and 'at' carry little semantic meaning and are automatically removed using a built-in stop-word list. This ensures your results contain only meaningful terms, not filler words that appear frequently but add no SEO value.
home.seoHowPhraseDesc: Beyond single keywords, the tool detects and ranks two-word phrases (bigrams) and three-word phrases (trigrams) that appear together. These multi-word combinations often represent more specific and valuable search terms, capturing the full context of how words are used.
home.seoHowUrlNote: For URL extractions, our tool fetches the publicly accessible HTML of the webpage, respects robots.txt directives, and extracts the main text content before running the same keyword analysis used in Text mode. Just paste a URL and get results instantly — no signup needed.
home.seoFaq5Q: What’s the difference between regular and AI keyword extraction?
home.seoFaq5A: Regular keyword extraction, available now for free, uses word frequency analysis, keyword density, stop-word filtering, and phrase detection (bigrams and trigrams) to identify the most common terms in your text. AI semantic extraction is planned as a Pro feature for future release. Until then, the free Text and URL modes provide keyword extraction without signup.
home.seoFaq6Q: Do I need to sign up to use the keyword extractor?
home.seoFaq6A: No signup is required for the free Text and URL extraction modes. You can paste text or enter any publicly accessible URL and get keyword results instantly. AI-powered semantic extraction is planned for a future Pro plan, which may require an account. All free features will remain available without registration.

errors.invalidJson: The request could not be read. Please try again.
errors.textRequired: Please enter some text before extracting keywords.
errors.textTooLong: Text must be 10,000 characters or fewer.
errors.robotsBlocked: This page blocks automated extraction with robots.txt.
errors.fetchTimeout: The page took too long to respond. Please try again or paste the text directly.
errors.fetchFailed: Unable to fetch this page. Please check the URL or paste the text directly.
errors.nonHtmlContent: Only HTML web pages can be extracted.
errors.emptyContent: No readable page content was found. Try pasting the text directly.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Daily free extraction limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.

home.noKeywordsFound: No keywords found. Try adding more content.
home.aiLockedDesc: AI-powered semantic extraction is available exclusively for Pro users.
